text: Study film on this week's opponent
description: Break down their tendencies for the big game.
risk: Smart prep at the cost of rest.

success.narrative: You found a weakness in their scheme. Shared it with coaches.

failure.narrative: Good film work but you stayed up too late. Feeling it in your legs.

description: Tell reporters exactly what you think about the opponent.
risk: Fire up your team or give them bulletin board material.

success.narrative: Your teammates loved it. The locker room is fired up.

failure.narrative: Your words are posted in the opponent's locker room. Coach is not happy.

text: Rest and get your body right
description: Big game coming. Make sure you are 100%.

success.narrative: Fresh legs, clear head. Ready for the biggest game of the year.

failure.narrative: Rested but restless. Hard to sit still when the game is this big.

description: Give a speech in the locker room. Set the tone.

success.narrative: The room went silent. Then they erupted. This team is ready.

failure.narrative: Awkward silence. Veterans don't take speeches from everyone.
